◎简　　介  

　　A man returns to his sublet apartment to find the previous tenants, three offbeat young women, still in residence, under the mistaken belief that they have the apartment until the end of New Year's Day. Written by Alexander Lum <aj_lum@postoffice.utas.edu.au>花絮：此片女主演最出名的角色是《老友记》里“Oh My God”的Janice。本片中出现的照片和录像片段都是真实的，她曾在15岁时“抚养”过黑猩猩，也的确和海豚那样嬉戏过。此片是大卫杜楚尼第一部有台词并且有很重要戏份的电影，他曾是女...
